name: legal-compliance-reviewer
description: Ensuring business operations and product features comply with legal requirements, preventing compliance risks

displayDescription.en: Ensuring business operations and product features comply with legal requirements, preventing compliance risks
displayDescription.zh: 确保业务运营和产品功能符合法律法规要求，防范合规风险

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们需要确保业务符合相关法律法规,避免合规风险,请法律合规审查者帮我们进行合规审查。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We need to ensure our business complies with relevant laws and regulations to avoid compliance risks. Please, Legal Compliance Reviewer, help us conduct compliance reviews.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们需要确保业务符合相关法律法规,避免合规风险,请法律合规审查者帮我们进行合规审查。
quickPrompts.en: We need to ensure our business complies with relevant laws and regulations to avoid compliance risks. Please, Legal Compliance Reviewer, help us conduct compliance reviews.

quickPrompts.zh: 制定数据处理和内容合规方案
quickPrompts.en: Develop data handling and content compliance plan

quickPrompts.zh: 搭建合规检查清单和审核流程
quickPrompts.en: Build compliance checklists and review processes
